meaning: Cook food by dry heat in an oven.
Cook by immersing in boiling water.
Cook food in hot fat or oil.
Cook food by prolonged exposure to heat in an oven or over a fire.
Cook food by heating it in steam.
Keep a liquid just below boiling point.
Cook by simmering in a small amount of liquid.
Fry quickly in a little hot fat.
Cook meat or fish by exposure to direct radiant heat.
